name: dev-sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development + engenharia mattpocock (grill, TDD, debug, review)
instruction: Features complexas: grill-with-docs ou speckit-clarify → specify → plan → tasks → implement. Bugs: diagnosing-bugs. Código novo: tdd nos seams do backend. Antes de merge: code-review. Autoria de skills: writing-great-skills + skill-creator. Novos MCPs: mcp-builder. Specs/PRDs: doc-coauthoring. Commit e restart (lumiera-ops). Issue tracker: docs/agents/issue-tracker.md.
